title: Corpus Artifact
description: A structured output produced by a pipeline step or analysis process in an evidence module. Artifacts are referenced by provenance link from PPW data files; they are not promoted to PPW claims unless they pass claim-promotion gates.

artifactId.description: Stable kebab-case identifier for this artifact.

artifactClass.description: The class of pipeline artifact this record describes.

originModuleId.description: ID of the evidence module that produced or owns this artifact.

corpusId.description: Corpus registry ID this artifact belongs to.

caseIds.description: PPW case IDs this artifact contributes to.

sourceRepository.description: Source repository URL or owner/repo where this artifact resides.

sourceRef.description: Git commit SHA, tag, or branch ref in the source repository at the time of last reference.

sourcePath.description: Path within the source repository where this artifact resides.

importStatus.description: referenced: artifact lives in source repo, linked by provenance; imported: artifact content brought into PPW data; deferred: import planned but not scheduled; blocked: import blocked pending rights or review.

rightsStatus.description: Copyright and rights status for this artifact.

provenanceStatus.description: Whether origin, author, and access method are fully documented for this artifact.

description.description: Short description of what this artifact contains.

notes.description: Free-text notes about artifact state, known gaps, or review decisions.
